title: Phalangium ossifragum

It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, analgesic, and antispasmodic properties, making it beneficial for treating arthritis, muscle and joint pain, as well as digestive issues. The bioactive constituents of Phalangium ossifragum include iridoid glycosides, such as harpagoside, which contribute to its therapeutic effects. In herbal medicine, Phalangium ossifragum is commonly prepared as a tincture, capsule, or tea, and is used to alleviate pain and inflammation, as well as to promote relaxation and improve sleep quality.
